title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
The US-Iran ceasefire has not yet changed much on the water, while the impact of the signing of the Memorandum of Agreement betweenthe US and Iran on the Hormuz chokepoint remains to be seen. For now, uncertainty surrounding transit through the Strait persists, with the number of monitored transits still well below pre-conflict levels. In dry bulk, rates softened with the recording a week-on-week decline of approximately 7.3%.
